message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.log1p passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-5ria)

Expose fnp_python.log1p delegating to numpy.log1p(x). Precision-preserving
element-wise log(1 + x) for small x. Parity oracle test covers:
- log1p(0) exactly 0
- log1p(e-1) ≈ 1
- tiny x retains x-precision (unlike naive log(1+x))
- 1-D mixed-sign array across valid domain
- integer input promotion to float with matching dtype
- 2-D array element-wise
- complex input
- boundary: log1p(-1) = -inf on both implementations
